item.title: Bato Dela Rosa runs from arrest warrant, backs Cayetano in Senate takeover
item.description: Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano says the Senate will not allow the arrest of Dela Rosa.

item.title: Typhoon Mawar strengthens as it approaches Philippine Area of Responsibility
item.description: PAGASA raises Signal No. 1 over Batanes as typhoon approaches.

item.title: PBA Commissioner holds emergency meeting over Blackwater controversy
item.description: The league is investigating an alleged tampering incident.
